notes: Specification for OS-independent intelligent I/O subsystem; aimed to separate device-specific and OS-specific driver code
Intel-based server platform; I2O designed as enhancement for IA servers
Peripheral Component Interconnect; bandwidth limitation that I2O aimed to address
Actual solution to PCI bandwidth bottleneck; I2O was superseded by PCIe approach
Target OS for I2O support; I2O support remained limited in NT
Primary OS where I2O achieved some adoption; NetWare 5 included I2O support
Vendor product label indicating I2O specification compliance; Aberdeen recommends requiring this in procurement
